description: A short LLM-written prose summary of Ethan's coding over the last 7 days, derived from the same GitHub + WakaTime activity. Plain third-person paragraph — quote it directly when summarizing what he's currently working on.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu spent 3 hrs 9 mins coding, averaging 1 hr 2 mins per day. His activity was concentrated in Java, Python, and Markdown, and WakaTime recorded work across 4 projects. On GitHub, he opened 12 pull requests in qiuethan/Misty, from #106 through #117.
